question: How does the preserved pre-rebrand GitHub repository namespace score against the seed graded repo-search eval dataset?
hypothesis: The preserved github-doctacon-turbo-search-v1 namespace should retrieve grade-3 implementation files in the top results for most seed cases.
notes: Live retrieval-only baseline targets the existing semantic namespace originally applied from https://github.com/Doctacon/turbo-search. The Buoy rebrand does not rename or recreate it. Re-run only after separately confirming that namespace contains corpus paths compatible with the selected dataset. No apply, delete, or namespace-management action is part of this experiment.
